text: Here, I drift between emptiness and stimulation. The first space feels bare, open, and quietly vast—a place where my mind echoes with its own questions, unanchored and free. The second space, flooded with color and information, proposes a celebration of knowledge and inquiry. I feel curiosity stir within me, pulled by words, images, and the promise of discovery. Wandering from silence to stimulation, I’m reminded of how environments shape the rhythms of my thoughts.
